prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-FLGKNIFE-HWT258A Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: Full Tang Clip Point Blade Slim Kydex Sheath Hook Handle - Flag Description: The ASR Tactical clip point blade has a super-fine point tip, making it ideal for precision tasks like hunting and self-defense. With a blade of just 3.5" in length and an overall length of 8.25", it can easily fit inside of a pocket, backpack or purse for quick deployment.

Our full tang blade features an ergonomic handle with a finger hook and comes with a sturdy black Kydex sheath so you can store the blade safely when not in use. The blade itself is constructed of heavy-duty stainless steel so you don't need to worry about it rusting, making it great for outdoor use too.

This blade is a must-have tactical and self-defense tool for anyone who values their safety either indoors or outdoors. Its decorative design also makes it a great gift for knife collectors and enthusiasts. Search Terms: fixed blade knives clip point kydex sheaths utility knife hunting bugout tactical blades full tang camping tools outdoor for hunters Features: - CLIP POINT BLADE - This ASR Tactical knife features a clip point blade, which is characterized by its spine with a front section that appears to be clipped off. This type of blade has a fine point that's ideal for precision tasks like hunting and self-defense. - FULL TANG FIXED KNIFE - Our full tang fixed blade knife is made of one solid piece of metal that constitutes the blade and runs down the handle as well, making it incredibly sturdy and durable. - COMPACT SIZE - The blade itself measures 3.5" and the overall length is 8.25" so you can store it in small spaces like pockets, backpacks, bags or purses. - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Made of heavy-duty 3CR13 stainless steel that won't rust, this knife is great for use indoors or outdoors, rain or shine. The ergonomic handle features a finger hook and decorative holes. - KYDEX SHEATH - The ASR Tactical knife comes with a sturdy black slim Kydex sheath that features a metal pocket clip so you can easily affix it inside your pocket. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
